# Support

`orkyo-foundation` is the **shared library** behind the Orkyo product editions, maintained on a
**best-effort basis** — there is no SLA or guaranteed response time.

**Using or self-hosting Orkyo?** You're probably in the wrong place — head to
[orkyo-community](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-community) for install help and product issues. Open
things here only when they concern the shared library itself.

| I want to… | Use |
|---|---|
| Report a **bug in the shared library** (domain, scheduler, validators, shared UI) | [Open an issue](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-foundation/issues/new/choose) |
| Ask a **question** or discuss **placement / API design** | [Start a discussion](https://github.com/Kymr10n/orkyo-foundation/discussions) |
| Report a **security vulnerability** | See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) — **do not** open a public issue |
| Understand **what changed** for consumers | [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) |

For bug reports, include the foundation package version, whether it reproduces in a unit test vs. only
through a consumer (community/saas), and the relevant stack trace or failing assertion.
